markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Galileo and GrowthX to align on content strategy and SEO goals.](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Galileo aims to 3x revenue by end of next year, crossing $10M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Current content strategy focuses on big thematic trends (e.g. RAD, agents) with in-depth series and gated assets](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Major opportunity to improve organic search presence and build out systematic content funnel](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop initial content strategy and calibration articles over next 2-3 weeks before ramping up production](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

## Topics

### Galileo's Business Goals and Target Audience

  - [Targeting 3x revenue growth to $10M ARR by end of next year](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Two key audience segments:](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
    1.  Thought leaders and Silicon Valley influencers in AI space
    2.  Developer community (shifting from ML engineers to broader software developers/PMs)
  - [ICP: Global 2000 enterprises pursuing AI initiatives and digital natives with $20M+ funding and active AI projects](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
  - [250 named target accounts, refreshed quarterly with 15-80 new accounts](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)

### Galileo's Product and Positioning

  - [Positioned as an "evaluation and intelligence platform" for generative AI](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Helps teams evaluate and monitor AI model quality, costs, and issues across development and production](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2197.0)
  - [Key modules: Evaluate (testing/iteration), Observe (production monitoring), Protect (proactive risk mitigation)](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2456.0)
  - [Differentiator: Out-of-the-box metrics without requiring ground truth data](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Key competitors: Arize, Braintrust, LangChain (LangSmith), Patronus AI](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
  - ["Good enough" alternatives: Databricks, MongoDB](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2904.0)
  - [Scale AI pushing aggressively into the space](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2910.0)

### Current Content Strategy and Challenges

  - [Focus on big thematic trends (e.g. RAD, agents) with multi-part blog series and gated e-books](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3099.0)
  - [Lack of systematic content funnel and limited organic search presence](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3191.0)
  - [Resource constraints: outsourced design, website updates, technical expertise time](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3283.0)
  - [Basic SEO issues discovered (e.g. improper sitemap setup)](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3240.0)

### GrowthX Approach and Next Steps

  - [Develop "mind map" of key themes and subtopics to build topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3334.0)
  - [Start with calibration articles in weeks 2-3 to nail quality before ramping up production](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3505.0)
  - [Explore improvements to site structure, cross-linking, and topic pages over time](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3592.0)
  - [Set up deeper dive sessions on publishing process, content strategy brainstorming](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3461.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to follow up with action items and schedule deeper dive sessions](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3451.0)
  - [Galileo to provide access to Google Search Console and other relevant tools/data](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3461.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop initial content strategy draft and calibration articles over next 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3491.0)
  - [Schedule content strategy brainstorming session to validate approach and develop topic "mind map"](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3491.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration with Galileo's product team on AI agent workflows and expert evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/aL3ssPAdyEMhpMTrSMn2JHnBdHgKK_wJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3497.0)
